text:
REGIME — Defensive bid met risk-on rotation; breadth narrow, vol compressing.

INDICES — VIX 25.1, falling. QQQ +0.60%, IJR +0.54%, SPY +0.47%, IWM +0.43%, DIA +0.37% best to worst. Small caps (IJR +0.54%) edged large caps (SPY +0.47%). VIXY dropped -2.45%, signaling vol sellers stepping in aggressively.

SECTORS — XLP +0.94%, XLY +0.82%, XLE +0.73%, XLF +0.71%, XLK +0.58%, XLI +0.51%, XLRE +0.36%, XLC +0.05%, XLV -0.36%, XLU -0.37%, XLB -0.38%. Top industries: MSOS +6.23%, IBIT +4.08%. Bottom industries: TAN -1.26%, LIT -1.42%.

THE 7s — Defense +1.25%, Fab +1.22%, Housing +1.08%, Toll Road +1.00%, Semi +0.84%, Bank +0.80%, Industrial +0.66%, Energy +0.57%, New Staples +0.51%, Old Staples +0.45%, Insurance +0.44%, Freight +0.35%, Cloud +0.19%, Old Metals +0.05%, Medtech -0.16%, Power -0.27%, Health -0.39%, Buildout -0.40%, Software -0.63%, New Metals -0.85%. Strongest ticker in Defense 7 not specified in data; weakest in New Metals 7 not specified — GLD proxy fell -0.41%.

SIGNALS — Fear & Greed 54/100, Neutral. Top movers: MSOS +6.23% (Industries), IBIT +4.08% (Industries), WGMI +2.63% (Industries). 20d momentum best sector: XLE +6.19%; worst: XLY -4.53%. Best basket 20d: Energy +8.57%; worst: Software -10.72%. Tech rebound in QQQ and Fab +1.22% tied directly to Iran de-escalation hopes easing geopolitical risk premium.

WATCH — EATZ: +2.02%, 10.5x average volume — unusual accumulation warrants follow-through check. IJK: +0.28%, 8.0x vol spike on minimal price move — divergence signals potential positioning ahead of catalyst. Software 7: -0.63% today, -10.72% on 20d, -25.20% YTD — momentum breakdown deepening despite broader risk-on; watch for capitulation or reversal setup.
